'''Rolo''' was a participant of the [[Katharsis]], the game founded by the failed [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Xanatos]] and the [[Telos IV|Telosian]] treasurer [[Vox Chun]]. He was disabled in a game of Katharsis.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Day of Reckoning]]'' {{1stm}}
